Fixed: unwrapped return_schema

discovery: PATTERN: All tools with return_schema wrapping {status,data} or {data,metadata} fail because jsonschema.validate(result["data"], return_schema) validates just the data value. Fix: unwrap return_schema to describe data content directly with additionalProperties:true. Widespread across: PDBeSIFTS, PDBeValidation, Pfam, PlantReactome, PomBase, PROSITE, ProteinsPlus, ProteomeXchange, PubChemBioAssay, PubChemTox (6 fixed this batch), PharmGKB (3 fixed prev batch).
